CustomField.description: Determines how the next approver is resolved when this step is approved or rejected. NotRequired = the next step already has a configured approver (no action needed); Dynamic = resolved automatically by a custom Apex class; UserInput = the user must select the next approver in the modal.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Choose NotRequired if the next step has a pre-assigned approver. Choose Dynamic if the approver is determined programmatically (set ApproverResolverClass__c). Choose UserInput if the submitting user must manually pick the next approver.
CustomField.label: Next Approver Source
